title: move_to_pos_target_vect command
description: Move towards a target entity position using a direction vector (no pathfinding).
markdownDescription: *Move* towards a *target* entity position using a direction vector (no pathfinding).

prefixItems.title: move_to_pos_target_vect command
prefixItems.description: Move towards a target entity position using a direction vector.
prefixItems.markdownDescription: *Move* towards a *target* entity position using a direction vector.

target.title: Target Entity
target.description: Entity ID, alias, or blackboard pointer whose position to move towards.
target.markdownDescription: *Entity ID*, alias, or *blackboard pointer* whose position to move towards.

max_time_s.title: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the position
max_time_s.description: Maximum time in seconds to reach the position. After this time the movement stops.

dt_comp.title: Delta-time Compensation
dt_comp.description: Compensate movement for current framerate. Default is true.
dt_comp.markdownDescription: Compensate movement for current framerate. Default is `true`.

absolute.title: Ignore velocity
absolute.description: Move without applying entity velocity. Default is false.
absolute.markdownDescription: Move without applying entity velocity. Default is `false`.
